## PiPipe.use() method

Installs custom routes or behaviors using direct `uWebSockets.js` access.

**Signature:**

```typescript
use(installer: RouteInstaller | ((app: TemplatedApp) => void)): this;
```

</td><td>

Installer object or callback.

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

this

The current `PiPipe` instance.

## Remarks

This is the escape hatch for advanced integration cases where `handle()` or `route()` are not enough.
